Features.sectionSubtitle: We bring you the finest collection of Tunisian digital media, meticulously selected for quality and cultural depth.
Features.cinematicDescription: Immersive documentaries and short films that capture the essence of our heritage.
Features.photographyDescription: A gallery of high-resolution images from every governorate, ready for your projects.
Features.collectionsDescription: Expertly curated collections for creators, businesses, and educators.

CTA.title: Start Your Journey
CTA.subtitle: Join a community of creators and explorers discovering the hidden gems of Tunisia.

Impact.title: Discover Impact Projects
Impact.subtitle: The Impact module allows you to discover environmental and social impact projects through rich multimedia content. Providing ready-to-use content for businesses to promote entrepreneurship.

ImpactHero.subtitle: Discover environmental and social impact projects through rich multimedia content. Ready-to-use content for communication, awareness, and audiovisual production.

Tounesna.title: Tounesna
Tounesna.subtitle: Showcasing authentic Tunisian territories through high-quality multimedia (photos, videos, reels) to promote sustainable and responsible tourism.

Footer.description: A digital media library with two modules: Impact (supporting projects via CnBees) and Tounesna (discovering Tunisian heritage).

Orders.title: My Orders
Orders.noOrders: You haven't placed any orders yet.

Testimonials.title: Trusted by Creators
Testimonials.subtitle: Hear from the storytellers and businesses who rely on our platform.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our platform and licensing.
FAQ.a1: We offer simple, royalty-free licensing for all our content. Once you purchase or download, it's yours to use in any project.
FAQ.a2: Yes! We represent a growing community of Tunisian creators. Sign up as a creator to start uploading.
FAQ.a3: Our Premium collection features exclusive content you won't find anywhere else.

Newsletter.title: Stay Inspired
Newsletter.subtitle: Get the latest updates, featured stories, and exclusive offers delivered to your inbox.
Newsletter.disclaimer: We care about your data in our privacy policy.

MissionSection.subtitle: OUR MISSION
MissionSection.paragraph1: We are a digital media library dedicated to sharing impact content capturing the stunning stories, cultural depth, and breathtaking landscapes of Tunisia.
MissionSection.paragraph2: Join a passionate community of creators and explorers dedicated to showcasing the authentic beauty and heritage of Tunisia.

RegionsPreview.subtitle: Value Tunisia's natural and tourist heritage and encourage sustainable tourism with attractive visual content (Silver, Gold, Premium).

ImpactPreview.subtitle: Discover environmental and social projects. Ready-to-use content.
ImpactPreview.featuredDesc: Buy complete packs (Silver, Gold, Premium) or download a free video upon registration.
